data.body:
For both terminal view types, let's make it easier to view/navigate.  Take for example, output like this:

```
Let me check the pools section which renders in advanced mode, and the SheetContent component for layout clues.
▶ Read /Users/cartine/foolery/src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx
▶ Read /Users/cartine/foolery/src/components/settings-actions-section.tsx
     1→"use client";
     2→
     3→import { toast } from "sonner";
     4→import {
     5→  Zap,
     6→  Clapperboard,
     7→  Layers,
     8→} from "lucide-react";
     9→import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
    10→import {
    11→  Select,
```

By default we want to only show:

```
Let me check the pools section which renders in advanced mode, and the SheetContent component for layout clues.
▶ Read /Users/cartine/foolery/src/components/settings-pools-section.tsx
▶ Read /Users/cartine/foolery/src/components/settings-actions-section.tsx
```

you should be able to  toggle Thinking Detail on/off, and by default it should be off.
data.title: UI Terminal & Conversation History: Content filter toggles
